channel.title: ELF on Arturo Sauza de la Vega, Ph.D.
channel.description: Recent content in ELF on Arturo Sauza de la Vega, Ph.D.

item.title: Quantum Chemical Topology
item.description:
Summary

Write a detailed summary of the project here. You can write as much as you need, including equations using $…$ for inline math or $$…$$ for display math.

For example: The spin Hamiltonian is given by $$\hat{H} = D\hat{S}_z^2$$

Objectives

  • Investigate the electronic structure of transition metal complexes
  • Model magnetic properties using ab initio methods
  • Identify design principles for improved qubit coherence times

Publications

  • Title of Paper 1
  • Title of Paper 2
  • Title of Paper 3
